Name: UCameraShake
Description:
A CameraShake is an asset that defines how to shake the camera in 
  a particular way. CameraShakes can be authored as either oscillating shakes, 
  animated shakes, or both.
 
  An oscillating shake will sinusoidally vibrate various camera parameters over time. Each location
  and rotation axis can be oscillated independently with different parameters to create complex and
  random-feeling shakes. These are easier to author and tweak, but can still feel mechanical and are
  limited to vibration-style shakes, such as earthquakes.
 
  Animated shakes play keyframed camera animations.  These can take more effort to author, but enable
  more natural-feeling results and things like directional shakes.  For instance, you can have an explosion
  to the camera's right push it primarily to the left.

Variables.Name: bSingleInstance
Variables.Description:
If true to only allow a single instance of this shake class to play at any given time.
	   Subsequent attempts to play this shake will simply restart the timer.

Variables.Name: OscillationDuration
Variables.Description: Duration in seconds of current screen shake. Less than 0 means indefinite, 0 means no oscillation.

Variables.Name: OscillationBlendInTime
Variables.Description: Duration of the blend-in, where the oscillation scales from 0 to 1.

Variables.Name: OscillationBlendOutTime
Variables.Description: Duration of the blend-out, where the oscillation scales from 1 to 0.

Variables.Name: AnimPlayRate
Variables.Description:
Parameters for defining CameraAnim-driven camera shakes
	 
	 Scalar defining how fast to play the anim.

Variables.Name: AnimScale
Variables.Description: Scalar defining how "intense" to play the anim.

Variables.Name: RandomAnimSegmentDuration
Variables.Description: When bRandomAnimSegment is true, this defines how long the anim should play.

Variables.Name: Anim
Variables.Description: Source camera animation to play. Can be null.

Variables.Name: Anims
Variables.Description: Source camera animations to play. Can be empty.

Variables.Name: bRandomAnimSegment
Variables.Description:
If true, play a random snippet of the animation of length Duration.  Implies bLoop and bRandomStartTime = true for the CameraAnim.
	 If false, play the full anim once, non-looped. Useful for getting variety out of a single looped CameraAnim asset.

Variables.Name: ShakeScale
Variables.Description: Overall intensity scale for this shake instance.

Variables.Name: OscillatorTimeRemaining
Variables.Description: Time remaining for oscillation shakes. Less than 0.f means shake infinitely.

Variables.Name: AttenuationFloatCurve
Variables.Description: Source camera curve to add. Can be null.

Functions.Name: BlueprintUpdateCameraShake
Functions.Description: Called every tick to let the shake modify the point of view

Functions.Name: ReceivePlayShake
Functions.Description: Called when the shake starts playing

Functions.Name: ReceiveIsFinished
Functions.Description: Called to allow a shake to decide when it's finished playing.

Functions.Name: ReceiveStopShake
Functions.Description: Called when the shake is explicitly stopped.
